description: ClusterGenerator defines a generator to match against clusters registered with ArgoCD.

flatList.description: returns the clusters a single 'clusters' value in the template

selector.description: Selector defines a label selector to match against all clusters registered with ArgoCD. Clusters today are stored as Kubernetes Secrets, thus the Secret labels will be used for matching the selector.

values.description: Values contains key/value pairs which are passed directly as parameters to the template
